meta.name: A. A. M. Ashfatul Islam
meta.heroAbout: Frontend Developer focused on building responsive React interfaces, smooth user experiences, and production-ready web products.
meta.about: Frontend Developer with 3 years of experience building web products using React, Next.js, and TypeScript. Converted 200+ Figma designs into responsive interfaces and shipped 17+ commercial applications. Passionate about clean code, modern architectures, and delivering exceptional user experiences.

achievements.title: Frontend Arch.
achievements.description: Built React interfaces for 17+ SaaS platforms.

achievements.title: API Integration
achievements.description: Integrated 30+ APIs with global state management.

impact: Served as the sole frontend developer, independently managing all UI deliverables across the entire product portfolio.
Shipped production features across diverse domains — LMS, e-commerce, accounting, and legal — balancing new builds with legacy maintenance.
Delivered ~50 React screens for Marifa LMS with REST API integration, multilingual, and RTL support.
leadership: Built the entire React frontend for a Learning Management System (LMS) independently, converting provided Figma designs into production-ready user interfaces.
Worked closely with designers and backend engineers to deliver responsive interfaces and integrate backend APIs on schedule.
responsibilities: Built reusable React components for commercial web applications.
Translated 200+ Figma designs into responsive interfaces using React, JavaScript, SCSS, and Laravel Blade.
Integrated 30+ REST APIs using React Query, Context API, Axios, and React Hook Form.
Implemented multilingual, RTL, semantic HTML, and cross-browser support.
Optimized performance with lazy loading, code splitting, and memoization.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
education.description: Gaining a comprehensive foundation in computer science principles, algorithms, and modern software engineering practices. Actively applying theoretical concepts to real-world web development and optimizing scalable user interfaces.

certificates.title: Reactive Accelerator - Batch 4
certificates.info: Advanced React and Next.js program (93.56%) covering architecture, hooks, routing, state management, API integration, and Next.js App Router.

projects.name: Aniya
projects.description: Private baby milestone tracker with growth charts, feeding/sleep logs, photo timeline, family sharing with role-based access, and PWA support. Deployed on Vercel.

projects.name: E-commerce Website
projects.description: A full-stack e-commerce application built with Next.js 16 as the capstone project of the Learn with Sumit Next.js course, featuring authentication, product management, image uploads, email integration, and a responsive shopping experience.

projects.name: Mess Management Website
projects.description: Mess management website built with Next.js 16 and Supabase, featuring real-time data synchronization and a responsive user interface.
